ddls:
CREATE TABLE "trials" (
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trial */,
  "trial_number" TEXT /* Official trial number */,
  "trial_type" TEXT /* Type of trial (e.g., IPR, PGR) */,
  "trial_date" TEXT /* Date when the trial was conducted */,
  "decision_type" TEXT /* Type of decision issued (e.g., FINAL WRITTEN DECISION) */,
  "petitioner" TEXT /* Name of the petitioner */,
  "patent_holder" TEXT /* Name of the patent holder */,
  "filing_date" TEXT /* Date when the trial was filed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the trial (e.g., PENDING, COMPLETED) */,
  "assigned_attorney_id" INTEGER /* ID of the assigned attorney */,
  "assigned_paralegal_id" INTEGER /* ID of the assigned paralegal */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the trial record */,
  "next_deadline" TEXT /* Next critical deadline for the trial */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the trial is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trial_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trials_assigned_attorney_id FOREIGN KEY ("assigned_attorney_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trials_assigned_paralegal_id FOREIGN KEY ("assigned_paralegal_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "decisions" (
  "decision_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each decision */,
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the trial the decision belongs to */,
  "patent_holder_name" TEXT /* Patent holder associated with the trial */,
  "order_text" TEXT /* Text of the decision order */,
  "associated_patent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated patent */,
  "claim_disposition" TEXT /* Disposition of the claims */,
  "multi_page_order" INTEGER /* Whether the order is multi-page */,
  "decision_date" TEXT /* Date when the decision was issued */,
  "decision_status" TEXT /* Status of the decision (e.g., FINAL, DRAFT) */,
  "uploaded_by" TEXT /* Name of the user who uploaded the decision */,
  "uploaded_date" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the decision was uploaded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("decision_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_decisions_associated_patent_id FOREIGN KEY ("associated_patent_id") REFERENCES patents ("patent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_decisions_trial_id FOREIGN KEY ("trial_id") REFERENCES trials ("trial_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patents" (
  "patent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the patent */,
  "patent_number" TEXT /* Official patent number */,
  "patent_type" TEXT /* Type of the patent (e.g., PAT-B2) */,
  "affected_claims" TEXT /* Claims affected by the trial */,
  "patent_status" TEXT /* Current status of the patent (e.g., ACTIVE, EXPIRED) */,
  "inventor" TEXT /* Name of the inventor */,
  "filing_date" TEXT /* Date when the patent was filed */,
  "grant_date" TEXT /* Date when the patent was granted */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the patent record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for login */,
  "password" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., ATTORNEY, PARALEGAL, ADMIN) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trial_documents" (
  "document_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the document */,
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the trial the document belongs to */,
  "document_type" TEXT /* Type of the document (e.g., PETITION, ORDER) */,
  "document_name" TEXT /* Name of the document */,
  "document_path" TEXT /* Path to the document file */,
  "uploaded_by" TEXT /* Name of the user who uploaded the document */,
  "uploaded_date" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the document was uploaded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("document_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trial_documents_trial_id FOREIGN KEY ("trial_id") REFERENCES trials ("trial_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user to be notified */,
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trial related to the notification */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., DEADLINE, DECISION) */,
  "notification_text" TEXT /* Text of the notification */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date of the notification */,
  "is_read" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the notification has been read */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_trial_id FOREIGN KEY ("trial_id") REFERENCES trials ("trial_id")
)
